zh.lifeSummary: 當Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern於1250年之前出生時，她的父親Sambor II Duke of Pomerania38歲，母親Matilda of Mecklenburg40歲。她於大約1280年與Adolf V Count Of Holstein結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1309年2月15日。

zh-hans.Legnica, Dolnośląskie, Polska: 波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉萊格尼尼卡

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern于1250年之前出生时，她的父亲Sambor II Duke of Pomerania38岁，母亲Matilda of Mecklenburg40岁。她于大约1280年与Adolf V Count Of Holstein结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1309年2月15日。

nameMeanings.name: Euphemia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a Late Greek name derived from eu ‘well, good’ + phēnai ‘to speak’. This was the name of various early saints, notably a virgin martyr said to have been burned at the stake at Chalcedon in 307 . It had a limited popularity in some regions in the 16th and 17th centuries and returned to favour in the Victorian period, especially in the pet form Effie . It is little used at present.

nameMeanings.name: Alenta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Polish: derivative of the personal name Walenty, Polish form of Latin Valentinus (see Valentine ).

variants.name: Valentine
meanings: form of the Latin name Valentinus, a derivative of valens ‘healthy, strong’. This was the name of a Roman martyr of the 3rd century, whose feast is celebrated on 14 February . This was the date of a pagan fertility festival marking the first stirrings of spring, which has survived in an attenuated form under the patronage of the saint.

en.lifeSummary: When Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern was born before 1250, her father, Sambor II Duke of Pomerania, was 38 and her mother, Matilda of Mecklenburg, was 40. She married Adolf V Count Of Holstein about 1280. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 15 February 1309.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern est née avant 1250, son père, Sambor II Duke of Pomerania, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Matilda of Mecklenburg, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Adolf V Count Of Holstein environ 1280. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 février 1309.

de.lifeSummary: Als Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern vor 1250 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sambor II Duke of Pomerania 38 und ihre Mutter Matilda of Mecklenburg 40. Sie hat um 1280 Adolf V Count Of Holstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Februar 1309.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern è nata il prima del 1250, sua padre, Sambor II Duke of Pomerania, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Matilda of Mecklenburg, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Adolf V Count Of Holstein circa 1280. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 15 febbraio 1309.

ja.lifeSummary: Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommernが1250年以前に生まれた時，父Sambor II Duke of Pomeraniaは38歳，母Matilda of Mecklenburgは40歳であった。約1280年にAdolf V Count Of Holsteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1309年2月15日に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern(이)가 1250년 이전에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sambor II Duke of Pomerania(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda of Mecklenburg(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1280년 Adolf V Count Of Holstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1309년 2월 15일 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern nasceu antes 1250, seu pai, Sambor II Duke of Pomerania, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Matilda of Mecklenburg, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Adolf V Count Of Holstein aproximadamente 1280. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1309.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern родилась перед 1250 г., её отцу по имени Sambor II Duke of Pomerania было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda of Mecklenburg, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adolf V Count Of Holstein около 1280 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 февраля 1309 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Euphemia Alenta Samborowna von ost pommern nació antes de 1250, su papá, Sambor II Duke of Pomerania, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Matilda of Mecklenburg, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Adolf V Count Of Holstein aproximadamente 1280. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1309.
